summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Open non-security PRs should stay on their individual maintainer/review paths; closed PR #90441 should remain closed; security-sensitive Slack ingress PR #91244 is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Legitimate standalone PR with unresolved merge/proof work; no duplicate or low-signal close path in this inventory shard.
Standalone feature PR with maintainer review/proof context; not a duplicate or closure candidate.
Narrow open PR with a linked security-sensitive report, but the artifact does not mark the PR itself security-sensitive. Keep it independent rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Standalone open fix PR for a hydrated issue; no evidence supports duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closure.
Standalone open fix PR with an active linked issue and nontrivial compatibility surface.
Already closed; preserve historical classification only.
Security-boundary Slack ingress work is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation and should be handled by central security review.
Standalone performance PR; keep on normal maintainer-review path.
Standalone build compatibility PR with recent activity; not a closure candidate.
Related to an active issue and plausible fix path, but proof failure prevents stronger recommendation.
Exact linked security-sensitive issue should be routed to central security handling without blocking unrelated non-security classifications.
Exact linked Slack ingress security-boundary issue should be handled by central security review.
